visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind other objects.
A yellow lemon sitting in the front-center, blocking the water bottle.
A green soda can to the left of the lemon, blocking the water bottle.
A red soda can to the right of the lemon, blocking the water bottle.
A brown paper bag behind the bottle and cans.
The wooden surface the objects are on.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is the most forward object blocking the robot's access path to the water bottle.
The green soda can also blocks the graspable area of the water bottle and must be moved.
The red soda can also blocks the graspable area of the water bottle and must be moved.
All obstructing objects have been removed, and the path to the water bottle is now clear.
